title: Lint baseline cleanup — ignoreError revert + errcheck policy
goal: Wrap up the 2026-07-09 pantheon-base review by landing the reviewed backend lint remediation: drop the no-op ignoreError() helpers, relax errcheck check-blank to allow idiomatic _ = err, and document the remaining lint debt without changing runtime behavior.

in: remove 8 no-op ignoreError() helpers and 22 call sites, restoring idiomatic _ = err
keep reviewed genuine lint fixes (godoc, gosec perms, json.Marshal error handling, dead-code removal, type conversions)
document the remaining 807 lint issues and a batched remediation plan
out: clearing the remaining 807 lint issues in this change
any runtime behavior change beyond the reviewed real fixes
unrelated frontend/DESIGN.md working-tree changes from a parallel task

implementationNotes: Claude acted as planner/reviewer; the backend .go revert was authored by Codex per the repo role split.
The ignoreError() helpers only existed to satisfy errcheck check-blank:true; relaxing that policy makes _ = err legal and idiomatic.
One real bug fix rode along: token_middleware blacklist check was swallowing the Redis error.

affectedSubgraph: linter config -> backend error-ignore sites -> idiomatic _ = err

runtimeEvidence: command baseline for build, vet, and golangci-lint
grep confirmation that ignoreError is fully removed

evidenceRequired: command baseline for build, vet, and golangci-lint
review notes describing the reviewed diff and the ignoreError revert
humanGates: approve before merging the PR (release/merge is a human gate)
